query: Show me audiences that are not mapped to any destination and not used in any journey.

trace.sql: SELECT s.SEGMENTID, s.NAME FROM dim_segment s LEFT JOIN hkg_br_segment_target st ON s.SEGMENTID = st.SEGMENTID WHERE st.SEGMENTID IS NULL

results.NAME: Campaign: New Application Credit Card Offer

warnings: Skipped hkg_br_property_property.parquet: Invalid Input Error: Failed to read Parquet file 'DBSnapshot/hkg_br_property_property.parquet': Need at least one non-root column in the file
